sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n63290" key="lime/nios" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">λῐμέν-ιος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">α</itype>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n63290.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">of the harbour</tr_>, epith. of Aphrodite, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0525.tlg001.perseus-grc1:2:34:11" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Paus.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.34.11</biblScope> </bibl>; of Zeus, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg2133.tlg001:p.84" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Ach.Tat.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">Intr.Arat.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">p.84</biblScope> </bibl> M.; cf. sq.</sense> </entryFree>
